videos.video_subject: The science experiment where scientists cut the stadium lights the instant the ball was crossed and Cristiano Ronaldo still scored a header in total darkness, proving his superhuman anticipation
videos.video_script: Scientists cut the stadium lights the instant the ball left the crosser's boot. Total darkness. Ronaldo couldn't even see the ball coming. And then... he scored. A perfect header, in the pitch black, off pure instinct. He had already calculated exactly where that ball would land before the lights died. That isn't normal eyesight. That is a completely different brain. So you have to wonder,
videos.video_terms: Cristiano Ronaldo header goal close up, Ronaldo focused intense face during a match, Ronaldo jumping for a header, Ronaldo scoring a goal in the dark, Ronaldo Portugal jersey header, Ronaldo Al Nassr header goal, Ronaldo training experiment, Ronaldo volley finish, Ronaldo celebrating a goal, Ronaldo eyes focused on the ball
